recent_excerpts: Microsoft released out-of-band updates for Windows Server 2019 and 2022 after April 2026 security patches caused boot failures and domain controller authentication issues, forcing some administrators
CISA orders federal agencies to patch CVE-2009-0238, a 17-year-old Microsoft Office Excel remote code execution flaw, by April 28, 2026, due to active exploitation.
A recent Microsoft Edge browser update has introduced a bug that breaks the right-click paste functionality within chats in the Microsoft Teams desktop client, impacting user workflow.
